notes: Group operating, project drawdown, trust, and payroll accounts
Progress claims raised and outstanding — per FBL5N customer line items
Retention withheld by client — released on Practical Completion
Revenue earned (POC × contract) exceeds billings to date — current asset
Advance payments to suppliers and accrued income not yet invoiced
Materials on site — recognised as cost when consumed in construction
Owned plant and equipment at cost less accumulated depreciation
Cash collateral held as security for performance bonds
Approved subcontractor and supplier invoices awaiting payment
5% retention withheld from subcontractor payments — SOP Act 2002 compliance
Month-end accruals — work completed, invoice not yet received

Net BAS position: GST collected (1A) less input credits (1B). Debit = refund due

Multi-state payroll tax liability — VIC 4.85%+surcharge, NSW 5.45%, WA 5.50%
12.0% SG contributions — remitted quarterly via SuperStream
Contingent liabilities — ANZ/NAB BG lines; disclosed but not recognised until called
Recharges from Lendlease Corporate shared services — require WBS allocation
Ordinary shares on issue
Accumulated profits less dividends paid
Revenue recognised on % completion basis — POC × contract value per project
Approved Variation Orders (VOs) — separate from original contract sum
PS items confirmed and instructed by superintendent

Miscellaneous project income — dayworks, hire-back of plant, etc.
Directly employed site labour — wages, allowances, super included via payroll
Head contractor site supervision cost allocated to project
External subcontractors — trade accounts, Security of Payment Act applies
Concrete, steel, formwork, consumables — trade account or site purchase
Hired cranes, excavators, hoists — Coates/Kennards/Tutt Bryant
Engineers, surveyors, architects, project managers — Concur or direct invoice
Government charges — GST-free (G12). WorkSafe, EPA, building permits, council fees
Site travel, flights, accommodation — Concur expense policy applies
Site sheds, fencing, security, waste disposal, temporary services
Project-specific insurance, PI, public liability — GST-free for input tax
Corporate and shared services staff — not directly allocable to projects
SAP licensing, Procore, Concur, O365 — shared services recharge
Contract disputes, regulatory compliance, employment matters
RCF interest, bank guarantee fees, facility arrangement costs — financial instrument
Current tax — 30% corporate rate on taxable income
Temporary differences — construction contract timing, accelerated depreciation
